instruction: Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new LiveActivity API to show a running timer.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 PencilKit API to draw with pressure sensitivity.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppDock API to add a custom dock item.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 WorkoutAPI to display workout progress.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new MultiScreen API to show content on two screens.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new ObjectPlacement API to place a 3D model in space.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published String property to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a Double property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Ints to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Strings to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Float property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a daily water intake, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite author, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a CPU temperature, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a mindfulness session count, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite director, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a detected object count, configurable via AppIntent.
Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppPrivacy API to display privacy status.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 Collaboration API to start a shared drawing session.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppLock API to lock the app with FaceID.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 WaterIntake API to display water intake progress.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new ParentalControls API to show allowed ratings.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new ObjectDetection API to show detected objects.

Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing an array property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Bool values to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Double values to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional String property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite sport, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite city, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a RAM usage percentage, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a heart rate zone, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite genre, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a detected scene name, configurable via AppIntent.
